# Overview {.unnumbered}

This book reports an integrative analysis of single-nucleus RNA-seq, GeoMx spatial
transcriptomics, and bulk proteomics and phosphoproteomics across four mouse models of
Alzheimer's disease. It asks how amyloid reshapes microglia under different tau
backgrounds, reading the tau-amyloid interaction across all four modalities.

Analysis chapters arrive in later phases. This page marks the reproducible foundation: a
pinned R environment (rv), a pinned Python environment (uv), a targets pipeline, and this
Quarto book.
